meta.title: Dawarly — Find New Jobs Before Everyone Else
meta.description: Dawarly automatically monitors LinkedIn, Indeed, Bayt, and other job platforms to surface the newest roles in one centralized job feed so you can apply first and stay organized.

hero.imageAlt: Job seeker using Dawarly dashboard to find new roles on LinkedIn, Indeed, and Bayt
hero.description: Dawarly automatically scans the most popular job sites and collects the newest roles in one place. It's free and doesn't require any payment.
hero.socialProofSuffix: job seekers use tools like Dawarly to stay ahead of new postings.

features.title: Beat Other Candidates to New Roles
features.description: Dawarly automates the repetitive parts of job hunting — checking multiple sites, refreshing tabs, and copying links — so you can focus on sending stronger applications earlier than everyone else.

items.allFeaturesDescription: Dawarly is built for job seekers, not recruiters. You get every feature, unlimited boards, and unlimited searches — with zero cost.
items.multiPlatformDescription: Connect searches from LinkedIn, Indeed, Bayt, and other job boards so new roles appear in a single, unified job feed.
items.alertsDescription: Get notified as soon as new matching jobs appear so you can be among the very first to apply.

about.title: Built for people serious about their job search
about.description: Dawarly was created for job seekers who are tired of opening ten tabs every morning just to see what's new. Instead of manually checking LinkedIn, Indeed, Bayt, and other platforms, Dawarly monitors your saved searches and pulls new roles into one simple dashboard.
about.missionDescription: Help job seekers apply earlier and stay organized so they can focus on preparing stronger applications — not refreshing job boards all day.
about.whoDescription: Fresh graduates, software developers, and professionals who track opportunities across multiple platforms and want a single place to monitor, review, and manage every application.

pricing.title: All Dawarly features are 100% free
pricing.description: No credit card. No trial period. Dawarly is designed for job seekers who need a faster way to discover and manage opportunities — not another subscription to worry about.
pricing.planDescription: Everything you need to find and track jobs early.

benefits.unlimitedSearches: Unlimited job searches and tracked boards
benefits.autoScraping: Automatic scraping of new roles from multiple platforms
benefits.unifiedFeed: Unified job feed with filters and search

cta.title: Be the first to see the jobs you want.
cta.description: Dawarly scans multiple job platforms for you and delivers fresh opportunities into one simple dashboard — completely free.
